summary: User wants to remove some text and replace it with a unique animated button in yellow/red shades.

existing_features.title: In HeroSection.tsx, locate the second anchor/button element inside the CTA buttons container (matching XPath: /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[1]/div[7]/div[2]/a[2]). Remove its existing text content and replace it with a visually unique animated button styled in yellow and red shades. The button should feature: a gradient background blending yellow (#FFD700 / amber) and red (#EF4444 / rose) tones, a pulsing or glowing animation (e.g., pulse glow, shimmer sweep, or fire-flicker effect using Tailwind keyframes or inline CSS animations), a unique shape or border treatment (e.g., angled clip-path, flame-style border, or animated border-dash), and bold uppercase label text (e.g., 'JOIN NOW' or 'ENLIST'). The button must stand out from existing CTA buttons on the page.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove existing text and add a unique animated button with yellow and red shades
